name: Zephyrus Sylphim, the Smokestorm Serpent
sd_appearance: A towering, sleek Genasi with flowing silvery hair and eyes like a tempest of azure and violet strides through the Undercity's dimly lit alleys. His ash grey chainmail, adorned with the Wardens of Ash badge, clinks with each step, revealing a muscular build that speaks of a life spent in battle. A spear and crossbow rest easily on his back, while a handaxe is slung at his hip. A prominent ash-mark etched on his left cheek, the mark of an officer, adds an air of authority to his imposing figure. A swirling tendril of smoke coils around his right wrist, a testament to the elemental force that pulses beneath his skin.
faction_visual: ash grey chainmail or plate, Warden badge, ash-mark on left cheek if officer
style_note: utilitarian-military — built to survive, nothing wasted
